meaning: Generalized System of Preference(关税)一般特惠制
examples: The GSP framework isn't competing directly with Velocity.
For larger blocks of GSP markup, you can use a partial template.
Type grails generate-all AirportMapping to create the controller and GSP views.
Every summer, SU selects 80 top students from around the world to join the GSP class.
The EU would remove tariffs and quotas, reinstating the Generalised System of Preferences (GSP).
